finding_results.notes: Reduced the inheritance persuasion run to one explicit doctrinal claim and shifted the rest of the temptation into crowd behavior, Ilyan's self-implicating admission, and the physical/social mark left on Daro.
finding_results.summary: The back-room exchange now keeps the singular-authority lure clear without stacking abstract restatements, using pilgrims' requests, Ilyan's willingness to exploit that attention, and Daro's bodily reaction to carry the danger.
